sys_update_version.payload: truefalsefalsedesktop,tablet,mobileviewportdefault1{ "mobile": { "height": "250px", "width": "100%" }, "desktop": { "height": "250px", "width": "100%" }, "tablet": { "height": "250px", "width": "100%" } }<!-- AngularJS template with configurable options. Use the `options` object to control dynamic behavior. Example: Display an element when max row count is 10: <div ng-if="options.maxRowCount === 10"></div> The `skeleton-container` class is used for loading placeholders. --> <div class="skeleton-container"> <!-- Header Skeleton --> <div class="skeleton-box skeleton-header"></div> <!-- Body Skeleton --> <div class="skeleton-box skeleton-line"></div> <div class="skeleton-box skeleton-line small"></div> <div class="skeleton-box skeleton-line medium"></div> </div>falsemdb423af9547990f14516b5ac5316d43f68679ef89cb21120000f8d856634c9c4fsp_instanceadmin2026-06-05 06:15:457b2323d547990f14516b5ac5316d43dd22913deb94745cb90516b5ac5316d43012913deb94745cb90516b5ac5316d4301sp_instance_7b2323d547990f14516b5ac5316d43ddadmin2026-06-05 06:24:11<url/><widget_parameters><![CDATA[{ "html": { "value": "<div class="steps-section"> <h2 class="section-title">How It Works</h2> <div class="title-decoration"> </div> <div class="steps-grid"> <div class="step-item"> <div class="step-number">1</div> <h3>Select Medicine</h3> <p>Browse or search for your medicine</p> </div> <div class="step-item"> <div class="step-number">2</div> <h3>Place Order</h3> <p>Fill the form and get approval</p> </div> <div class="step-item"> <div class="step-number">3</div> <h3>Pickup</h3> <p>Collect from pharmacy</p> </div> </div> </div> <style> .steps-section { background: #FFFFFF; border-radius: 32px; padding: 3rem 2rem; margin-bottom: 50px; border: 1px solid #E2E8F0; } .section-title { font-size: 28px; font-weight: 700; margin: 2rem 0 1rem; text-align: center; color: #0F172A; } .title-decoration { width: 70px; height: 4px; background: #E60000; margin: 0.5rem auto 2rem auto; border-radius: 4px; } .steps-grid { display: flex; gap: 2rem; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-top: 2rem; } .step-item { text-align: center; flex: 1; min-width: 200px; } .step-number { background: #E60000; color: white; width: 50px; height: 50px; border-radius: 50%; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 28px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 1rem; } .step-item h3 { font-size: 20px; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; } .step-item p { color: #64748B; font-size: 14px; } @media (max-width: 768px) { .steps-grid { gap: 1rem; } } </style>", "displayValue": "<div class="steps-section"> <h2 class="section-title">How It Works</h2> <div class="title-decoration"> </div> <div class="steps-grid"> <div class="step-item"> <div class="step-number">1</div> <h3>Select Medicine</h3> <p>Browse or search for your medicine</p> </div> <div class="step-item"> <div class="step-number">2</div> <h3>Place Order</h3> <p>Fill the form and get approval</p> </div> <div class="step-item"> <div class="step-number">3</div> <h3>Pickup</h3> <p>Collect from pharmacy</p> </div> </div> </div> <style> .steps-section { background: #FFFFFF; border-radius: 32px; padding: 3rem 2rem; margin-bottom: 50px; border: 1px solid #E2E8F0; } .section-title { font-size: 28px; font-weight: 700; margin: 2rem 0 1rem; text-align: center; color: #0F172A; } .title-decoration { width: 70px; height: 4px; background: #E60000; margin: 0.5rem auto 2rem auto; border-radius: 4px; } .steps-grid { display: flex; gap: 2rem; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-top: 2rem; } .step-item { text-align: center; flex: 1; min-width: 200px; } .step-number { background: #E60000; color: white; width: 50px; height: 50px; border-radius: 50%; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 28px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 1rem; } .step-item h3 { font-size: 20px; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; } .step-item p { color: #64748B; font-size: 14px; } @media (max-width: 768px) { .steps-grid { gap: 1rem; } } </style>" } }]]></widget_parameters></sp_instance><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=7b2323d547990f14516b5ac5316d43dd"/></record_update>
